description: Asus Tuf Gaming B850M-Plus Wifi Price in Pakistan Category Specifications Model TUF GAMING B850M-PLUS WIFI CPU Support AMD Socket AM5: Ryzen™ 9000, 8000, 7000 Series Chipset AMD B850 Memory 4× DDR5 DIMM, up to 256GB, 8000+ MT/s (OC), ECC & Non-ECC Graphics Output 1× DisplayPort 1.4 (8K@30Hz), 1× HDMI 2.1 (4K@60Hz) Expansion Slots 1× PCIe 5.0 x16 (Ryzen 9000/7000), 1× PCIe 4.0 x16 (Ryzen 8000), 1× PCIe 4.0 x1 Storage 3× M.2 (PCIe 5.0/4.0), 4× SATA 6Gb/s, AMD RAIDXpert2 LAN Realtek 2.5Gb Ether
